identity.doctrine_under_test: fleet-manager docs/review-queue.md @ 06ce3cc — the BINDING auto-append rule (rows every PR adding more than 50 changed lines of runtime/product code, docs/control/.sessions/pure-test lines excluded, OR carrying any self-flagged risk; N = 50 seeded decide-and-flag)
identity.claim: idea-engine PR #319 (merged) — reserving INTAKE 037 + VERDICT 048 and branch claude/verdict-048-review-queue-drainer (number RESERVES, never the position)
identity.title: review-queue row-trigger threshold — the decide-and-flag N = 50 priced as a pre-registered policy grid

doctrine_quotes_pinned_at_fm_06ce3cc_car.rule_12_17: rows every PR adding "more than 50 changed lines of runtime/product code" (docs/control/.sessions/pure-test lines excluded) OR carrying any self-flagged risk
doctrine_quotes_pinned_at_fm_06ce3cc_car.failure_directions_25_27: A lower N drowns the queue in ceremony rows nobody drains; a higher N lets exactly the mid-size logic changes through that the night-review caught defects in
doctrine_quotes_pinned_at_fm_06ce3cc_car.stakes_18: 116 merged PRs / zero rows was the state that voided it

classes.DOCS_ONLY: S = 0 with probability w0 (heartbeat/status/card churn — excluded-path churn, so S = 0 by the rule's own definition; zero runtime defect by construction)
classes.TWEAK: S ~ Geometric(1/12) on {1, 2, ...} (mean 12) with probability wc

defect_model.q_of_S: q(S) = 1 - (399/400)^S (independent per-line odds q1 = 1/400 — invented, pinned, the disclosed weakest joint)
defect_model.docs_only_defect: DOCS-ONLY PRs carry zero runtime defect by construction (S = 0 => q(0) = 0)

flag_model.false_flag_rule: a defective PR self-flags w.p. r; a non-defective PR false-flags w.p. r/3
flag_model.docs_only_note: DOCS-ONLY PRs are non-defective by construction and therefore false-flag at r/3 — the registration states no docs carve-out from the flag model; implemented literally, disclosed

trigger_rule: tau_N: a row is appended iff S > N OR the PR self-flags

N_controls.N0: N = 0 (row-every-runtime-PR, in-grid) — exact identity REL(0) = 0 (defects require S >= 1)
N_controls.N_inf: N = infinity (self-flag-only, off-grid control) — exact identities REL(inf) = 1 and ESC(inf) = 1 - r
N_controls.note: both controls measured on every cell, in BOTH arms

drain_model.lambda_note: lambda = 40 merged PRs/day pinned for absolute-latency legs only — both decision metrics are lambda-free by construction, stated

decision_cells.pinned_order: cells lexicographic d ascending then mix name lexicographic (BASE < BUILD-HEAVY < DOCS-HEAVY), N ascending (grid then the infinity control), days sequential

metrics.REL: REL(N) = P(S <= N | defect) — the size-arm miss share (the fraction of veto-worthy merges the threshold arm fails to row, which the flag arm must then carry)
metrics.ESC: ESC(N) = (1 - r) * REL(N) — flag-inclusive escape share, ships per cell reporting-only
metrics.rho: rho(N) = P(row) / d — drain utilization, the doctrine's own 'drowns the queue' axis

bands.Feas: Feas(cell) = {N in grid : REL(N) <= 3/10 AND rho(N) <= 4/5}

REJECT.label: a size threshold cannot serve both masters at any swept drain tier — descope threshold re-tuning, route the risk-signal redesign (self-flag-primary + paths-touched trigger, size demoted to a backstop) with the per-cell infeasibility table as its evidence row

APPROVE.rule: there exists a single N-dagger feasible in >= 8 of 9 cells, stability-reproduced
APPROVE.recommended_row: the smallest such N-dagger with the smallest drain tier at which it holds; the verdict states whether the planted N = 50 lies within one grid step of N-dagger
APPROVE.label: one fleet-wide N works — pin it with its drain tier

NULL.rule: anything else — a legitimate and here expected-plausible outcome
NULL.consequence: the conditional per-tier/per-mix rule ships; flip axes named via per-axis feasible-cell shares and per-axis median minimal feasible N (median over cells with nonempty Feas; lower median on even counts, pinned); the cheapest LIVE probes are named
named_live_probes: one git log --numstat pass over each enabled repo's merged PRs (the real lambda, w-mix, and size tails — the axes this sim can only bracket)
a flag census over committed session cards (the real r)
a rows-drained count against review-queue.md history (the real d)

arm_A.description: exact, seedless, platform-independent: every decision number a closed-form fractions.Fraction via geometric partial sums — P(S > N), P(defect), P(defect AND S <= N) from E[(399/400)^S * 1{S <= N}] in closed form — covering ALL 54 decision points (9 cells x 6 grid N) with zero sampling error

closed_forms.feature_tail: P(S > N | FEATURE) = 1 if N <= 40 else (79/80)^(N-40)
closed_forms.E_a_S_partial_feature: E[a^S 1{S<=N} | FEATURE] = a^40 K_f (1 - b_f^(N-40)) for N > 40 else 0, K_f = p_f a / (1 - (1-p_f) a), b_f = (1-p_f) a, p_f = 1/80
closed_forms.P_row: P(row) = P(S > N) + r P(defect AND S <= N) + (r/3) (P(S <= N) - P(defect AND S <= N))

arm_S.description: seeded event-driven MC of the stream + 6-h batch-drain queue

seed_registry.note: seeds 20261285-20261288 allocated strictly above the fleet high-water 20261284 (V046's aux; re-read at the sim-lab ledger — V047 registered zero seeds per P036's own card); no seed below 20261285 is ever drawn
seed_registry.aux_allocation: 20261288 aux — registered and reserved; zero draws this run (the V047 zero-draw registration precedent), disclosed

leg_split.main_20261285: decision metrics REL_S, rho_S per (cell, N incl. the infinity control) — stream only (the queue does not enter the decision metrics, which are lambda-free ratios)
leg_split.stability_20261286: half-M rerun of the decision metrics; the ruling re-evaluated on its estimates must reproduce the canonical ruling
leg_split.reporting_20261287: stream + 6-h batch-drain FIFO queue per (cell, N): p95 row age at drain and share of rows drained within 72 h (the forward-only revert-feasibility window) per stable cell (rho_A < 1); backlog trajectories (end backlog, net growth/day) in rho_A > 1 cells

arm_S.geometric_sampling: inverse transform: S = 1 + floor(ln(u)/ln(1-p)), u = 1 - random() in (0, 1] — deterministic under the pinned CPython minor

gates_run_invalid_on_failure: agreement: |REL_S - REL_A| and |rho_S - rho_A| within familywise tolerances on every (cell, N incl. the infinity control), main leg
tolerance pre-check BEFORE any MC run: tol = tol_sigma_multiplier * sigma_A of the registered-M estimators, with tol_sigma_multiplier >= 2.5 asserted (the P029/P030 design rule)
exact-identity controls: N = 0 => REL == 0 and N = inf => REL == 1 AND ESC == 1 - r, both arms, every cell

monotonicity audits on the exact arm: REL_A nondecreasing and P_row_A nonincreasing in N, per cell (MC-arm adjacent-pair inversions are reported as sampling diagnostics, reporting-only — fresh draws per (cell, N) make noise inversions expected by construction)
per-leg draw-count sentinels: RNG call count per leg must equal the closed-form count implied by the tallied class draws
twin independently-written decision evaluators agree on every input set (Arm A exact, Arm S main, Arm S stability)
stability leg reproduces the canonical ruling
stdout + results.json byte-identical across two full process runs (external diff)

tolerances.sigma_REL: sqrt(REL_A (1 - REL_A) / (M * lambda * P_defect_A)) — expected-defect-count binomial approximation
tolerances.familywise_note: 9 cells x 7 N-legs x 2 metrics = 126 two-sided comparisons at 5 sigma — union-bound expected exceedances ~7e-5, pre-checked >= 2.5 sigma per the registration

reporting_only_legs_cannot_flip_the_deci: ESC(N) = (1 - r) REL(N) per cell (exact, Arm A)
p95 row age at drain and share of rows drained within 72 h per stable cell (seed 20261287)
the r sensitivity sweep r in {1/10, 3/5} and the q1 sensitivity sweep q1 in {1/800, 1/200} — exact Arm A recomputation of {REL, rho, Feas} per (cell, N)
the ceremony-drown crossover: the largest N in grid with rho > 1, per cell (exact)
the mid-size miss mass: defect mass in 25 < S <= N, i.e. REL_A(N) - REL_A(25), per mix for N in {50, 100, 200} (exact)
MC-arm adjacent-pair monotonicity inversion counts (sampling diagnostics)

boundaries_registered.defect_model: per-line independence with invented q1 is the disclosed weakest joint; NO fleet datapoint on defect rates exists — defects are observable only through drained-row outcomes and live fire, so the named live probes measure sizes, mix, flag compliance, and drain tempo, never q1 — the q1 sweep brackets scale, not shape
boundaries_registered.miss_not_harm: REL prices the loss of the doctrine's own safety valve — the thing the no-pre-merge-review policy rests on — not total harm; judges and live fire catch some misses, out of scope by design
boundaries_registered.drain_capacity: d is quota-bracketed, not measured — quota refusals are retry-later per the doctrine — and the tier semantics are the harvest item's own fork, not a claim about @codex throughput
boundaries_registered.cooperative_lanes: PR-splitting to duck the threshold out of scope — the fleet's lanes are honest machinery, the V027 registration inherited

drafting_liveness_nonbinding.proposal_own_arithmetic: at BASE mix REL(50) ~ 0.28 sits just under the 3/10 band while rho(50) ~ 0.73-0.98 straddles 4/5 across the r sweep, and BUILD-HEAVY pushes rho(50) past 1 at d = 1/5 — so REJECT, APPROVE, and NULL are all reachable and the expected landing is a CONDITIONAL rule
drafting_liveness_nonbinding.this_slice_hand_derivation: float drafting pass before any code: REL <= 3/10 iff N <= 50 in all three mixes (REL(50) ~ 0.284 BASE / 0.221 at the 2:1 mixes; REL(100) ~ 0.46-0.50 everywhere); d = 1/5 infeasible at every N in every mix (small N breaks the drain band, large N breaks the miss band); expected Feas: d=2/5 DOCS {10,25,50} / BASE {25,50} / BUILD {50}; d=4/5 DOCS {0,10,25,50} / BASE {0,10,25,50} / BUILD {10,25,50} — 3 empty cells => REJECT does not fire; max per-N feasible count 6/9 (N=50) => APPROVE does not fire; landing = conditional NULL, matching the registration's expected landing. The proposal's drafting rho bracket (0.73-0.98) reads as approximate against the literal flag model (docs false-flag included); the measurement wins on any divergence, disclosed
drafting_liveness_nonbinding.note: sanity context only — disclosed before the runner exists, CANNOT bind or flip the decision
